meaning: vt.填塞,夯实n.捣棒,打夯的工具
examples: Then I tamp down the soil with the back of a rake.
Tom helps her tamp the soil with his squidgy fists.
On Monday, the White House aimed to tamp down expectations.
On the other side of the technical ledger, surging bond takeout activity helped tamp down supply.
Still, the primal urge I felt to fish was hard to completely tamp down.
